title: Export Docs into PDF with widget snippet
excerpt: If you connect boards to you monday doc, then try to export the doc via pdf, the spaces where the board widgets are will come out blank. The ask is for the pdf to reflect exactly how the doc looks including the widget. E…

posts.author: Allea (Allea G)
posts.cookedHtml: If you connect boards to you monday doc, then try to export the doc via pdf, the spaces where the board widgets are will come out blank. The ask is for the pdf to reflect exactly how the doc looks including the widget. Even if it is just a screenshot.
